category_sources: Official AA-project aview page describes an ASCII-art image browser and animation player.
source_facts.description says aview is an ASCII-art image browser and animation viewer.
display_name_sources: Official AA-project software link labels the project `Aview`.
docs_sources: Official AA-project aview page documents supported platforms, features, downloads, and file-format notes.
source_facts.homepage identifies the official AA-project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official AA-project pages provide project/download information but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official aview page lists ASCII rendering, image zooming, dithering, terminal/console support, and format output features.
source_facts.description identifies ASCII-art image browsing and animation viewing.
